tasks.title: Check constants file and existing page/component coverage
tasks.description: Read packages/shared/src/constants/index.ts and any existing /profiles, /reports, /notifications pages to avoid duplication.

tasks.title: Build /profiles page — profile list with create button
tasks.description: List all profiles (from mock). Card per profile with name, type badge, device count, status. 'New Profile' button (opens modal or navigates). Link each card to /profiles/[id].

tasks.title: Build /profiles/[id] — profile detail with rule management
tasks.description: Show profile info + category rules table. Allow changing action (allow/block/limit) for each category. Show site overrides list. Show schedules list. All via mock data.

tasks.title: Build /reports page — usage charts per profile
tasks.description: Profile selector. Weekly usage chart (Recharts area/bar). Category breakdown. Top sites list. Block events log. Use mockUsageReports.

tasks.title: Build /notifications page — full notification list + access request flow
tasks.description: Filterable notification list. Access requests with Approve/Reject buttons. Mark-all-read. Use mockNotifications + mockAccessRequests.

tasks.title: Build /settings page — account + subscription info
tasks.description: Account details display. Subscription tier card with upgrade CTA. Danger zone (delete account). Use mockAccount.

tasks.title: Add active nav highlighting to dashboard layout
tasks.description: Dashboard sidebar links show active state based on current pathname. Currently no active state exists.

tasks.title: Write Playwright E2E tests for dashboard navigation
tasks.description: Test that each nav link renders its page without errors. Extend e2e/example.spec.ts or add e2e/dashboard.spec.ts.
